g.title: GetDisconnectReasonText__27
g.text: SourceString = The server you are trying to join is running another version of the game, try updating your game!

g.title: GetDisconnectReasonText__182
g.text: SourceString = You cannot join at the moment. Perhaps the team is on the final stretch.

g.title: GetDisconnectReasonText__312
g.text: SourceString = You cannot join while mission is starting

g.title: GetDisconnectReasonText__411
g.text: SourceString = You cannot late join a deep dive

g.title: GetDisconnectReasonText__819
g.text: SourceString = Session does not exist any longer

g.title: GetDisconnectReasonText__910
g.text: SourceString = No free slots on the Team

g.title: GetDisconnectReasonText__1230
g.text: SourceString = You've been banned by the host of this session.

g.title: GetDisconnectReasonText__1335
g.text: SourceString = Sorry, but you were not responding.

g.title: GetDisconnectReasonText__1428
g.text: SourceString = Sorry, this was meant to be a private game.

g.title: GetDisconnectReasonText__1529
g.text: SourceString = Sorry, but I have my reasons.
